name: markdown-mirror
description: Live Markdown preview for your full VS Code workspace with Mermaid, KaTeX, TOC, slides, and export.

markdownMirror.autoStart.description: Automatically start Markdown Mirror when VS Code starts and a markdown workspace is open.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Open browser every time Markdown Mirror auto-starts.
Open browser only the first time Markdown Mirror auto-starts on this machine.
markdownMirror.autoOpenMode.description: Controls browser auto-open behavior during auto-start. Manual Start always opens the browser.

markdownMirror.enableMermaid.description: Enable Mermaid diagram rendering for fenced mermaid code blocks.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Sanitize rendered HTML to reduce XSS risk.
Trust raw HTML in markdown without sanitization. Use only for trusted local content.
markdownMirror.htmlMode.description: Controls how raw HTML inside markdown is handled.

markdownMirror.rootPath.description: Legacy single-folder scope. Relative path only (for example docs or Compiler). Absolute paths and traversal segments are ignored.
markdownMirror.rootPath.deprecationMessage: Use markdownMirror.rootPaths for multiple folder scopes.

markdownMirror.rootPaths.description: Optional list of relative folder paths (for example ["docs", "notes/specs"]). Absolute paths and traversal segments are ignored. In multi-root workspaces, each path is resolved inside each workspace folder.

markdownMirror.enableMath.description: Enable KaTeX math rendering for inline ($...$) and block ($$...$$) expressions.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Use default Mermaid theme in light mode and dark Mermaid theme in dark mode.
markdownMirror.mermaidTheme.description: Controls Mermaid diagram theme in browser preview.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Render YAML frontmatter as a collapsible metadata card above content.
Do not render frontmatter in preview.
markdownMirror.showFrontmatter.description: Controls how YAML frontmatter is displayed in preview.

markdownMirror.customCssPath.description: Optional relative CSS file path inside workspace to inject into browser preview.

markdownMirror.offlineMode.description: Enforced local-only mode: external HTTP/HTTPS resources are blocked in preview and export flows.

markdownMirror.defaultCompareMode.description: Open Markdown Mirror in compare mode by default for new browser sessions.

markdownMirror.defaultTocVisible.description: Show the TOC panel by default for new browser sessions.

markdownMirror.defaultTheme.description: Default preview theme used when no saved browser preference exists.

markdownMirror.defaultWidthMode.description: Default content width mode used when no saved browser preference exists.

markdownMirror.enablePrint.description: Show and enable Print / PDF action in preview.

markdownMirror.enableHtmlExport.description: Show and enable Export HTML action in preview.

markdownMirror.enableWordExport.description: Show and enable Export Word action in preview.

markdownMirror.enableSlides.description: Show and enable Slides mode action in preview.

markdownMirror.enableCompare.description: Show and enable Compare mode action in preview.

markdownMirror.enableToc.description: Show and enable TOC panel action in preview.

markdownMirror.enableThemeToggle.description: Show and enable light/dark theme toggle in preview.

markdownMirror.enableWidthToggle.description: Show and enable reading/full width toggle in preview.

scripts.package: npm run clean:vsix && npm run build && npx @vscode/vsce package
scripts.publish: npm run clean:vsix && npm run build && npx @vscode/vsce publish
